runbooks.title: High 5xx triage
runbooks.excerpt: Check recent deploys, dependency timeouts, database errors, then consider rollback if correlated with new deployment.

runbooks.title: Upstream timeout triage
runbooks.excerpt: Check upstream service health, timeout rate, retry pressure, and recent dependency failures.

runbooks.title: Checkout latency triage
runbooks.excerpt: Check downstream API latency and correlated backend errors.

runbooks.title: Gateway timeout triage
runbooks.excerpt: Check downstream service health, latency metrics, and network connectivity.
